mapper.sql: id, package_id, semantic_version, content_hash, status, parent_snapshot_id, runtime_snapshot_id, manifest, compatibility_statement, extends_version_range, submitted_by, submitted_at, published_by, published_at, rejected_by, rejected_at, reject_reason, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM domain_package_version WHERE package_id = #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'FROZEN') ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM domain_package_version WHERE package_id = #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_package_version (id, package_id, semantic_version, content_hash, status, parent_snapshot_id, runtime_snapshot_id, manifest, compatibility_statement, extends_version_range, submitted_by, submitted_at, published_by, published_at, rejected_by, rejected_at, reject_reason, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{packageId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{semanticVersion}, #{contentHash}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{parentSnapshotId}, #{runtimeSnapshotId}, #{manifestJson}, #{compatibilityStatementJson}, #{extendsVersionRange}, #{submittedBy}, #{submittedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{publishedBy}, #{publishedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{rejectedBy}, #{rejectedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{rejectReason}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE domain_package_version SET manifest = #{manifestJson}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, compatibility_statement = #{compatibilityStatementJson}, extends_version_range = #{extendsVersionRange}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'REVIEW_PENDING', submitted_by = #{submittedBy}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REJECTED')

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'REJECTED', rejected_by = #{rejectedBy}, rejected_at = #{rejectedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'REVIEW_PENDING'

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_by = #{publishedBy}, published_at = #{publishedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, runtime_snapshot_id = #{runtimeSnapshotId}, parent_snapshot_id = #{parentSnapshotId}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'REVIEW_PENDING'

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'FROZEN', updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'DEPRECATED', updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'FROZEN')

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'RETIRED', updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'DEPRECATED'

UPDATE domain_package_version SET status = 'FROZEN', rejected_by = #{rolledBackBy}, rejected_at = #{rolledBackAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, reject_reason = #{rollbackReason}, updated_at = #{rolledBackAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
